title: Job Ledger
description: One entry per generation attempt (image or video), for review history and linking to known-failure-patterns.md. Append-only; never rewrite past entries.

primary_input_asset_kind.description: Copied from the asset-manifest that validate-seedance-input.py approved for this job, for audit purposes.

matched_failure_patterns.description: FP-XXX ids from references/known-failure-patterns.md that this job's review matched, if rejected.
